page_metadata.biotools__summary: An open-source active surface tool for single-cell segmentation in 3D microscopy images. It is a plugin for Medical Imaging Interaction Toolkit (https://www.mitk.org/).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An open-source active surface tool for single-cell segmentation in 3D microscopy images. It is a plugin for Medical Imaging Interaction Toolkit (https://www.mitk.org/).
